authoring.mode: session-inline (orchestrating Claude session authored the MathReadings directly)
authoring.note: COST COLUMNS ARE VOID for this run (unmetered session-inline authoring; token columns stay 0, cps columns 0); the F5.2 cost headline stays DEFERRED (X15). WP-AUTH is the 51-source authoring CONTINUATION: the frozen 40-source run (checkpoint records + CSV waves 0-4) is RESUMED byte-identically (never re-authored, never rewritten -- the append design), and the 11 promoted sources (41-51) are authored + certified + mined as continuation waves 5-6. COVERAGE headline is now certified 46/51 (both arms equal, the F5.2 same-inputs discipline): the frozen 37 plus 9 of the 11 new sources. The 5 non-certified of 51 are HONEST: 38_infinitude_primes / 39_real_square_nonneg / 40_least_element / 51_goldbach are the 4 manifest-declared NON-TRANSCRIBABLE sources (operator:prime x2, carrier:Real, kind:set-object) -- the inline author DECLINES (reading_json empty, stage author-failed); 43_larger_integer_exists TRANSCRIBES (a genuine binder:exists reading, real exists in lean_text) but is an HONEST BOUNDED-SHADOW REFUSAL at stage instances: the natural faithful reading forall n exists m, n<m has NO in-bound witness at the outer edge n=B=8 (no m in [-8,8] exceeds 8), so the conservative bound-edge policy (COMPRESSION.md §11.6) over-refuses this truly-true UNBOUNDED statement -- the SAFE direction, never a false green; the reading was recorded as authored, NOT distorted to force a pass. The 4 EXISTENTIAL sources: 41_division_algorithm, 42_bezout_identity, 44_divides_witness CERTIFY via the merged bounded-shadow exists channel (all-outer-in-box witnesses stay in [-8,8] at B=8); 43 is the honest refusal above. refusals_by_source: {'43_larger_integer_exists': 'bounded-shadow instances refusal at outer edge n=8 (conservative bound-edge honesty, §11.6)', '38_infinitude_primes': 'non-transcribable operator:prime (declined)', '39_real_square_nonneg': 'non-transcribable carrier:Real (declined)', '40_least_element': 'non-transcribable kind:set-object (declined)', '51_goldbach': 'non-transcribable operator:prime (declined)'}. New-wave macro admissions: NONE -- governed live_macros stays 5, ungoverned 6 (the new readings USE the existing exogenous vocabulary; per-use translation certs grow 56->69 on the governed arm). order0_entropy_dl_est is a hindsight memoryless-coder REFERENCE bound in DL units, plotted for orientation, never asserted. smt_seconds is nonzero on waves 5-6 ONLY (the newly authored sources are the only ones re-certified this run; the resumed 40 are not re-certified) -- an honest wall-clock measurement, reported never divided in.

honesty_notes.corpus_dl_canon: WP-T6a-INTEGRATE / COMPRESSION.md §11.5 (req 6): the CANON-VIEW corpus DL (FI-W1-2: the admitted rung pipeline applied to a COPY of each pred), REPORTED BESIDE the raw reported_exogenous_dl, NEVER replacing it. APPEND-ONLY and GATED on a NON-EMPTY rung registry: with no admitted rung canon is the IDENTITY, so the column is OMITTED from the header (reported_columns()) and the committed CSV is byte-identical -- no re-baseline without an admitted rung. The pilot canonicalization rung is currently REFUSED by the admission gate (per-rule vacuity: 64/66 rules fire on <2 readings; and profit=0 with rung_model_bits=2748 on the committed corpus), so it STAYS proposed and this column is absent on the checkpoint. When a rung IS admitted the raw column holds the pre-canon baseline and this column shows the canon-priced DL alongside. Reported, never gated-on, never a floor.
honesty_notes.lean_seconds_total: 0.0 -- Lean absent; reported, never divided in (⚠E6).
honesty_notes.prequential_counting_dl: WP-P1 / COMPRESSION.md C1 (§11.1): a WAVE-GRANULAR COUNTING prequential DL. Per wave, the cumulative sum of mdl_macros.dl_reading over that wave's NEW exogenous readings, each priced under the PRE-wave frozen macro table (the snapshot BEFORE the wave's greedy mining ran). EXOGENOUS DATA BITS ONLY: macro MODEL bits are ABSENT from this column (dl_reading never charges dl_macro), so junk vocabulary does NOT pay upfront HERE -- that upfront-cost regularizer is the reserved -log p currency (prequential_dl, C2), which this counting column is deliberately NOT. The scorer is ORIGIN-BLIND over a fixed exogenous stream (it prices whatever readings are in the corpus, never seeing their origin); corpus MEMBERSHIP is origin-aware by design (the governed arm mines exogenous-only, the ungoverned arm mines exogenous+dreams). Teeth: on the GOVERNED arm hindsight reported_exogenous_dl <= prequential_counting_dl BY CONSTRUCTION (asserted); on the UNGOVERNED arm the relation may INVERT because a dream-witnessed macro charges exogenous model bits into reported_exogenous_dl with zero exogenous savings -- REPORTED there, NEVER asserted; that divergence IS the governance effect. Never a floor, never gated (E5).
honesty_notes.smt_seconds: wall-time of the Lean-free fidelity certification (SMT-dominated); reported, never divided in (⚠E6).
honesty_notes.trivially_closed: false for ALL entries -- no Lean toolchain, so no triviality event fires; the two cost variants coincide.
